---
title: ".Noha Orabi."
subtitle: ".. "
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
      - icon: linkedin
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/public-profile/settings/?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Ad_flagship3_profile_self_edit_contact_info%3BqYG6thD%2FTzW0KYBO7eNpEQ%3D%3D
      - icon: Practice website
        href: https://www.orabiorthodontics.com
      - icon: github
        href: https://nohaorabi.github.io/nohaorabi.github.io-LabX/ 
      - icon: envelope
        href: mailto:ngo2@case.edu
---
 <br>
  
## About Me

Dr. Noha Orabi is a board-certified orthodontist having treated thousands of patients in private practice and the greater Cleveland community for the past 7 years.  She is an Assistant Clinical Professor and co-Director of the Early Treatment Clinic at Case Western Reserve University.
..


## What I'm Doing Now


Orabi Orthodontics is dedicated to providing exceptional care and the smile to match. We proudly offer customized treatment supported by state-of-the-art technology. Our expert team offers many options to fit each of our patient’s needs, including traditional braces, clear braces, clear aligners, and so much more. Our goal is to make your clinical experience fun and welcoming. Everyone deserves a beautiful smile and we want to be there every step of the way.
..

## Quick Links

**[Download my CV](cv.pdf)**
  
## My Blog

[Visit my Orthodontic Blog](https://nohaorabi.github.io/jekyll-now/First-Blog/)
---

*Last updated: March 2026*
